# Jugaduji Digital Solutions

> Premium digital agency building high-performance websites, mobile apps, SEO strategies, and digital marketing solutions for modern businesses in India.

## About

Jugaduji Digital Solutions is a MSME-registered digital agency founded by Ashutosh Kushwaha in 2026. Based in Robertsganj, Uttar Pradesh, India, we serve businesses nationwide with affordable, premium-quality digital solutions.

We specialize in Next.js web development, React Native mobile apps, SEO optimization, UI/UX design, branding, and digital marketing.

## Services

- **Web Development**: Custom websites built with Next.js, React, and modern frameworks. Starting at ₹3,000.
- **Mobile App Development**: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android using React Native.
- **SEO Optimization**: Technical SEO, on-page optimization, local SEO, and content strategy.
- **UI/UX Design**: User-centered design with Figma prototyping and design systems.
- **Digital Marketing**: Social media marketing, Google Ads, content marketing, and analytics.
- **Branding**: Logo design, brand identity, and visual design systems.
- **Cloud Solutions**: Cloudflare Edge deployment, serverless APIs, and managed hosting.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Basic | ₹3,000/project | Domain, landing page, SEO, SSL, DNS management |
| Growth | ₹6,000/project | Domain (.in), 3 business emails, 3-page website, admin panel, hosting, training |
| Premium | ₹15,000/project | Everything in Growth + AI chatbot, Google Analytics, custom UI, ad design |
| Custom | Contact us | Full-stack web & mobile app, custom database, Cloudflare Edge, 1-year support |

## Founder

Ashutosh Kushwaha — Founder & Lead Architect. Specializes in full-stack development, system architecture, Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Cloudflare Workers, and SEO optimization. Trained at JSPIDER Training Center, Rajajinagar, Bangalore.

## Technology Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Cloudflare Workers, Hono.js, Drizzle ORM, Turso (SQLite), pnpm monorepo, Lucide icons.
